title: Weather and Tornadoes Enchanced
description: This makes weather and tornadoes cloud enhanced and the particles more clearer
body:
THIS RESOURCE PACK ISNT FOR THE NEW WEATHERS AND TORNADOES MOD * BUT I WILL MAKE THAT SOON*

THIS RESOURCE PACK WILL MAKE TORNADOES AND CLOUDS LOOK MORE REALISTIC AND THE LEAVES LOOK A LOT MORE SMOOTHER.
